title: antirrhinum arenarium
intro: Antirrhinum arenarium, also known as the stinkwort or stinking snapdragon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The plant's health benefits include its ability to ease respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, and its potential to act as an expectorant, helping to clear mucus from the lungs. Antirrhinum arenarium can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to treat a range of health conditions.
